parsedJson.summary: Clean GBP interface with professional branding but conversion flow relies entirely on Google's default layout without custom website optimization.

issues.title: Cookie consent banner covers primary business info
issues.what_observed: A large black cookie consent modal in the bottom-left corner covers approximately 20% of the viewport, obscuring the business description text that starts with 'DINO from FIX MY ROOF...'
issues.why_problem: A visitor from Google search who lands here to learn about the roofing service cannot read the critical service description without first dismissing a cookie banner. Many mobile users will bounce rather than hunt for a close button. This creates immediate friction at the moment of highest intent.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Cookie notices should be a thin banner at top or bottom (max 60px height) with a single 'Accept' action, or deferred until scroll/interaction. Core business information (services offered, service area, credentials) must be immediately readable without requiring any dismissal action.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove cookie banner entirely for static marketing site (no tracking cookies = no banner needed), or use minimal top-bar notice that doesn't obscure content.
issues.plain_explanation: 网站底部有一个很大的黑色弹窗挡住了公司介绍,访客必须先关掉它才能看到你们提供什么服务。很多人不会费这个劲,直接就走了。
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索访客平均只会在页面停留8秒来决定是否联系你。如果他们连你做什么都看不清楚,70%的人会直接返回搜索结果找下一家。这个弹窗每天可能让你损失3-5个潜在客户。

issues.title: Relying on GBP interface instead of owned website
issues.what_observed: This is a Google Business Profile screenshot showing Google's standard template layout with purple header, business hours widget, and default social icons. There is no evidence of a custom website design or branded landing page.
issues.why_problem: Google Business Profile is a directory listing, not a conversion-optimized sales page. Visitors see generic layout, cannot browse services/pricing/portfolio, and have no trust-building content beyond a text description. Competitors with real websites will appear more established and capture customers who want to 'learn more' before calling.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A dedicated website with hero section showing Brisbane roof restoration work, clear service list (pressure washing, ridge-capping, coating), photo gallery of before/after local projects, pricing guidance or free quote form, and testimonials with faces/names. Mobile-first design with phone CTA above fold.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Build standalone website and link from GBP. Hero: 'Brisbane Roof Restoration Experts — Free Quote' with phone button. Services grid, 6-12 project photos, 3-5 testimonials, simple contact form.
issues.plain_explanation: 你现在只有谷歌地图上的基础页面,没有自己的网站。这就像租别人的店面,而不是拥有自己的门店。客户看不到你的作品案例、详细服务、价格参考,会觉得你不够专业。
issues.customer_impact: 有自己网站的竞争对手转化率比只有GBP的高40-60%。当客户搜索'屋顶翻新布里斯班'时,他们会对比3-5家公司。没有网站展示案例和资质的企业,90%的情况下会被淘汰。每个月你可能因此失去10-15个高价值客户。

issues.title: Logo floats on generic purple background without context
issues.what_observed: The yellow house-and-roof logo sits centered on a solid purple (#5B3A8F approximate) rectangle with no supporting imagery, texture, or context. The purple is Google's default GBP accent color, not a custom brand choice.
issues.why_problem: This looks like a placeholder or template rather than an established Brisbane roofing business. Visitors cannot see what the work looks like, whether the team is local, or any visual proof of expertise. The purple is associated with Google's UI, not the brand, so it feels generic rather than memorable.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero section with photo of actual Brisbane roof restoration project (before/after, or team on-site with Brisbane skyline visible). Logo overlaid or positioned top-left. Real project imagery builds immediate credibility and differentiates from competitors using stock photos.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace purple block with full-width hero image: Brisbane residential roof mid-restoration, branded hard hats visible, clear sky. Overlay logo in white top-left, headline 'Brisbane's Trusted Roof Restoration Experts Since [year]', phone CTA.
issues.plain_explanation: 网站顶部只有一个紫色方块和logo,看不到任何真实的屋顶翻新照片或工作现场。访客无法确认你是真正在布里斯班干活的本地公司,还是只是一个虚拟品牌。
issues.customer_impact: 本地服务客户最关心'这家公司真的在我附近吗?他们干过我这样的活吗?'。没有现场照片或案例图的企业,信任度下降55%,电话咨询量减少一半。每周你可能因此少接到8-12个询价电话。

issues.title: Hours widget more prominent than service description
issues.what_observed: The 'Open 6:30 AM - 7:00 PM' widget with arrow is positioned above the business name and description, occupying the most prominent slot in the upper content area.
issues.why_problem: Visitors searching 'roofing Brisbane' want to know what services you offer and why to choose you, not your hours (which they assume are standard weekday business hours). Prioritizing hours over services/trust signals wastes attention in the critical first 3 seconds.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hours should be small text in footer or header corner (e.g. 'Mon-Sat 6:30am-7pm'). Top priority content: headline promise ('Brisbane Roof Restorations — 15 Years, 500+ Happy Homes'), service list, and phone CTA.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Move hours to header top-right as small text. Use prime above-fold space for value proposition headline, 3-column service icons (Pressure Washing, Ridge-Capping, Coating), and 'Call Now for Free Quote' button.
issues.plain_explanation: 营业时间占了网站最显眼的位置,但访客真正想知道的是'你们能修什么类型的屋顶?'和'为什么选你们?'。把重要空间浪费在次要信息上。
issues.customer_impact: 访客在页面顶部停留的时间最多3秒。如果这3秒看到的是营业时间而不是服务亮点,30%的人会认为这家公司没有突出优势,直接去看下一家。每天可能因此流失1-2个客户。

issues.title: Generic social media icons without engagement context
issues.what_observed: Five circular social media icons (phone, message, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok) are displayed in a row below the business name, all in black circles with white symbols, no labels or follower counts.
issues.why_problem: Icons without context do not build trust. A visitor cannot tell if these accounts have 50 followers or 5,000, or if they are active. Clicking to 'check' is friction most won't bother with. If the accounts have strong engagement (e.g. '1,200 followers, daily Brisbane project posts'), that is a trust signal being hidden.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: If social accounts have meaningful followings (500+ with regular local content), display as 'Follow us: Instagram (1.2K followers) | Facebook (800 reviews)'. If accounts are sparse, remove icons and prioritize phone/quote form instead.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Audit social accounts. If strong: add follower counts and testimonial snippets from comments. If weak: remove icons, replace with 'As seen on Google (4.8★ from 120 reviews)' trust badge.
issues.plain_explanation: 社交媒体图标没有显示粉丝数量或评价,访客不知道你的账号是活跃的还是空的。如果你有上千粉丝和好评,这是很大的信任背书,但现在被藏起来了。
issues.customer_impact: 如果你的Instagram或Facebook有大量本地案例照片和好评,展示'1200+粉丝'或'800条五星评价'可以让信任度提升35%,咨询转化率提高20%。藏起来的话,这些努力就白费了。

positive_observations: Logo design is professional and memorable with the yellow house/roof motif clearly communicating the roofing service
Business description copy is specific and credible, mentioning concrete services (pressure washing, ridge-capping, PRIMER coats, INDUSTRIAL ROOF COATINGS) and customer satisfaction focus
Hours are clearly stated, which is essential for local service trust
redesign_priorities: 1. Build dedicated website with Brisbane roof restoration hero image, service grid, before/after gallery, and mobile-optimized quote form
2. Replace cookie banner with no-tracking design or minimal top-bar notice that doesn't obscure business description
3. Add visual trust signals: photo of team/truck with Brisbane branding, Google review count/stars, '15 years serving Brisbane' credibility marker
